Cloud Setup
Enter your Supabase credentials to enable shared storage across all devices
Quick setup (2 min):
1. Go to supabase.com → New project (free)
2. SQL Editor → run the table creation query from the setup guide
3. Project Settings → API → copy URL + anon key → paste above
